settings.tagline: Professional grave care in Kyiv and across Ukraine. Trusted by families worldwide since 2008.
settings.heroHeadline:
You are far away —
but memory stays close.
settings.heroSubtext: We care for the graves of your loved ones in Kyiv and across Ukraine. Photo reports sent directly to you. Trusted by families in the USA, Israel, Germany and worldwide.
settings.guarantee: We complete all services within 14 days of payment. If we cannot access the grave for any reason, you receive a full refund with documented explanation and photographs.
settings.metaDescription: Professional grave care and cemetery maintenance in Kyiv and across Ukraine. We clean, restore and monitor grave sites with photo reports — trusted by families in USA, Israel, Germany and worldwide since 2008.

services.name: One-time cleaning
services.description: Complete grave cleaning with full photo documentation. Perfect first order to see the current condition.

services.name: Annual care plan
services.description: 3 visits a year — spring, summer and autumn. The most popular option for families living abroad.

services.name: Grave location
services.description: We find the burial site when you don't have exact location details — row, plot, or even which cemetery.

services.name: Repair & restoration
services.description: Fence painting, tile laying, monument repair, planting flowers. Fully coordinated, remotely.

services.name: Site visit & photo
services.description: A dedicated visit to photograph the current condition — useful before ordering cleaning or for a specific date.

services.name: Flower placement
services.description: Fresh flowers placed on the grave on a specific date — anniversary, birthday, or any occasion.

testimonials.text: We appreciate what you have done and will recommend your services to our friends and acquaintances.
testimonials.author: Family K.

testimonials.text: This is a blessing. We are so glad that even from thousands of kilometers away we can now care for our grandfather's grave. Thank you for your help.
testimonials.author: L.S.

testimonials.text: I am grateful for the professional approach and excellent work completed in the shortest possible time. I will definitely contact you again.
testimonials.author: N.V.

testimonials.text: Thank you very much for the excellent work. We will definitely continue our cooperation next year.
testimonials.author: O.P.

testimonials.text: Not the first year I have been using your services. The work on the grave was done with quality and on time. Thank you.
testimonials.author: T.K.
